title: Introduction to Search
content: Full-text search is a technique for searching natural language documents.

title: Database Indexing
content: Indexes improve query performance by reducing the number of rows to scan.

title: Text Analysis
content: Tokenization breaks text into individual terms for indexing and searching.

title: Relevance Scoring
content: BM25 is a ranking function used to estimate relevance of documents to a query.

title: Inverted Indexes
content: An inverted index maps terms to the documents containing them.
